key_items: Bitcoin ETF Losses Near $3B Across 10 Days as YTD Flows Turn Negative
Bitcoin Price Teeters Near The Edge As Bears Eye Another Breakdown
New US inflation report leaves Bitcoin with a problem the Fed cannot solve yet
reasoning: Multiple headwinds are pressuring BTC: 10-day consecutive ETF outflows totaling ~$3B, price breakdown below key support levels ($73,800-$72,500), and elevated inflation data (3.8% PCE YoY) limiting near-term Fed rate cut expectations. Positive regulatory developments (Coinbase India, CFTC futures approval) are being overwhelmed by macro concerns and technical weakness suggesting further downside risk.
risks: If Bitcoin closes below $72,500 support, algorithmic selling and liquidation cascades could trigger a sharp breakdown toward $70,000, particularly given the sustained institutional outflow pattern.
